policy_name: Business Expense Reimbursement Policy - Weaver & Book

validation_rules.requirement: All purchases from publishers, distributors, or book fairs must include an itemised receipt or invoice showing title counts and unit prices
validation_rules.notes: Applies to Granris Förlag, Vinterhamn Förlag, Ekblad Förlag, Thornfield Books, and any ad-hoc trade suppliers

validation_rules.requirement: Fika and team meals reimbursable up to 300 SEK per person per occasion; supplier meeting meals up to 800 SEK total
validation_rules.notes: Receipt must state number of attendees. Alcohol not covered. Reviewed by Lucia Weaver or designate Lars Petersson.

validation_rules.requirement: Train or budget travel for approved book fairs (e.g. Bokmässan Göteborg, Uppsala Bokfestival). Overnight accommodation requires prior approval from Lucia Weaver.
validation_rules.notes: Economy class only. Taxi receipts accepted when public transport unavailable after 22:00. Lars Petersson approves in Lucia's absence.

validation_rules.requirement: Duplicate receipts for the same date, merchant, and amount will be rejected
validation_rules.notes: Only one valid receipt per transaction. Flag to bookkeeper for review.

validation_rules.requirement: Personal book purchases, gifts, or non-business items are not reimbursable even if purchased from a trade supplier
validation_rules.notes: Staff book discount available through the standard staff purchase policy - not through expense reimbursement.

validation_rules.requirement: Catering for in-store author readings and the anniversary event reimbursable with an itemised invoice; coffee and pastries from Kaffestugan covered up to 1,500 SEK per event
validation_rules.notes: Henrik Johansson (Kaffestugan) invoices must reference the event date. Pre-approve catering above 1,500 SEK with Lucia Weaver.

validation_rules.requirement: Wrapping paper, bags, receipt rolls, shelf labels and general shop consumables reimbursable with receipt
validation_rules.notes: Bulk orders above 2,000 SEK should be raised as a supplier invoice via Fortnox rather than a personal claim.

validation_rules.requirement: Webflow, Stripe, Mailchimp and Square subscription fees are business costs paid by company card, not personal reimbursement
validation_rules.notes: If paid personally in error, attach the invoice and flag to Lars Petersson for transfer rather than reimbursement.

validation_rules.requirement: Local deliveries and supplier pickups by car reimbursed at the Skatteverket standard mileage rate; bus and train tickets within Uppsala reimbursable with ticket
validation_rules.notes: Maintain a simple mileage log with date, destination and purpose. Personal commuting is not covered.

validation_rules.requirement: Props, seasonal decorations and display materials reimbursable up to 1,000 SEK per display with receipt
validation_rules.notes: Reusable items remain shop property. Christmas display budget set separately each November.

validation_rules.requirement: Posters, flyers, bookmarks and printed event programmes reimbursable with supplier receipt
validation_rules.notes: Etsy stock-in-trade printing is recorded separately under cost of goods, not reimbursement.

validation_rules.requirement: Bookselling courses, translation workshops and trade association memberships reimbursable with prior approval
validation_rules.notes: Svenska Bokhandlareföreningen membership covered annually. Personal-interest courses not covered.

validation_rules.requirement: PostNord and courier costs for customer orders and returns reimbursable with receipt or shipping label
validation_rules.notes: Etsy international postage is logged against the Etsy shop accounts, not the main shop float.

validation_rules.requirement: Modest thank-you gifts or flowers for visiting authors reimbursable up to 400 SEK per author
validation_rules.notes: Receipt must note the author and event. Cash gifts are not permitted.

validation_rules.requirement: Foreign-currency receipts (e.g. Portland or German purchases) must be converted to SEK at the transaction-date rate with documentation
validation_rules.notes: Attach card statement showing the SEK charge where possible. Applies to occasional USD purchases.

validation_rules.requirement: Claims without a receipt require a signed missing-receipt declaration and are capped at 150 SEK
validation_rules.notes: More than two missing-receipt claims per quarter will be reviewed by Lars Petersson.

validation_rules.requirement: Expense claims submitted more than 30 days after purchase require owner approval
validation_rules.notes: Claims older than 90 days will normally be rejected unless exceptional circumstances apply.

validation_rules.requirement: Alcohol is not reimbursable except wine served at the 15th-anniversary event, which requires advance owner approval and an itemised invoice
validation_rules.notes: Anniversary-event exception only. Standard supplier meals and fika exclude alcohol.

validation_rules.requirement: Shelving, lamps, chairs and fixtures above 3,000 SEK are capital items and must be invoiced to the company, not claimed as expenses
validation_rules.notes: Small repairs and replacements under 3,000 SEK may be reimbursed with receipt.

validation_rules.requirement: Shared costs for joint Uppsala University events reimbursable per the agreed cost-split with an itemised breakdown
validation_rules.notes: Reference the signed collaboration note with Astrid Lindén. The University settles its share separately.

validation_rules.requirement: Routine cleaning supplies and minor maintenance reimbursable with receipt up to 800 SEK per month
validation_rules.notes: Contracted cleaning is paid by supplier invoice via Fortnox, not personal claim.

context: Policy applies to all employees and contractors of Weaver & Book enskild firma, Svartbäcksgatan 12, Uppsala. Expense claims must be submitted within 30 days of purchase. Approved by Lucia Weaver, Owner. Queries to Lars Petersson (bookkeeper).
